Program Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether a bowel toileting program is being utilized to manage the resident's bowel continence. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
9=Unable to Determine
265 H0600_CONSTPTN_CD H0600_CONSTPTN_CD H0600 Constipation Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether constipation is present. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
9=Unable to Determine
266 I0100_CNCR_CD I0100_CNCR_CD I0100 Active Diagnoses: Cancer Code CHAR 1 The
